name: @tyroneross/spectra
description: AI-native UI automation across web, macOS, iOS, and watchOS with plugin, MCP server, and standalone CLI surfaces.

scripts.build:native: mkdir -p $HOME/.spectra/bin && swiftc native/swift/*.swift -framework Foundation -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit -framework CoreGraphics -framework ScreenCaptureKit -framework AVFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-native && bash scripts/codesign-native.sh $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-native
scripts.build:daemon-helper: mkdir -p $HOME/.spectra/bin && swiftc native/swift/daemon-launcher/*.swift -framework Foundation -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-daemon-launcher && bash scripts/codesign-native.sh $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-daemon-launcher
scripts.build:composite: mkdir -p $HOME/.spectra/bin && swiftc -parse-as-library native/swift/composite-capture/*.swift -framework Foundation -framework ScreenCaptureKit -framework AVFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreGraphics -framework AppKit -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-composite-capture && bash scripts/codesign-native.sh $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-composite-capture && swiftc native/swift/screen-recording-preflight/*.swift -framework Foundation -framework CoreGraphics -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-screen-recording-preflight && bash scripts/codesign-native.sh $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-screen-recording-preflight
scripts.build:cursor-sampler: mkdir -p $HOME/.spectra/bin && swiftc native/swift/cursor-sampler/*.swift -framework Foundation -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit -framework CoreGraphics -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-cursor-sampler && bash scripts/codesign-native.sh $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-cursor-sampler
